# barracudawaf_json_key_profile (Resource)

`barracudawaf_json_key_profile` manages `JSON Key Profile` on the Barracuda Web Application Firewall.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "barracudawaf_json_key_profile" "test_json_key" {
    name = "test_terraform_json_key"
    parent = [ "DemoApp1", "test_json_profile" ]
    key = "user_id"
    value_class = "Integer"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- **key** (String) Key
- **name** (String) Profile Name
- **parent** (List of String) Parent format: [service_name, json_profile_name]
- **value_class** (String) Custom Parameter Class

### Optional

- **allow_null** (String) Allow NULL
- **allowed_metachars** (String) Allowed Metacharacters
- **base64_decode_parameter_value** (String) Base64 Decode
- **comments** (String) Comments
- **exception_patterns** (List of String) Exception Patterns
- **max_array_elements** (String) Max Array Elements
- **max_keys** (String) Max Number Of Keys
- **max_length** (String) Max Length
- **max_number_value** (String) Max Number Value
- **min_number_value** (String) Min Number Value
- **status** (String) Status
- **validate_key** (String) Validate Key
- **value_type** (String) Value Type
